# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Only the latest release is supported with security updates.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please report security vulnerabilities through GitHub's [private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/Niqnil/barter-rs/security/advisories/new).

This is a solo-maintained project. I will try to acknowledge reports within 2 weeks and aim to release fixes within 60 days, though timing depends on severity and complexity.

Please include:
- Description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce
- Potential impact
